narrative:
Reynoldsburg 3-B (precinct in Licking County) has 1,376 registered voters, with 62.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 12.5 percentage points.
